column3: This is survey 2. Which class are you filling this survey out for?
column16: I feel like I belong in this Chemistry class.
column21: I see myself as part of the learning community in this course.
column26: I believe my contributions in class are valued.
column31: My peers in this course respect my ideas.
column36: I feel comfortable working on group problems or labs with other students.
column41: I have at least one person in this class I could study with outside of class.
column46: My instructor(s) care about my learning and progress.
column51: I can be myself when interacting with classmates and faculty in Chemistry.
column56: I feel supported by the department or program offering this course.
column61: I see myself continuing in Chemistry or a related field after this class.
